parameters.subscriptionRequest/filterexpression: statuscode eq 741130003 and ts_surveypayloadjson ne null

parameters.item/ts_progressmessage:
@concat(
  '[Stage 2/3] Generating main PDFs... ',
  string(variables('runningDoneUnits')),
  '/',
  string(variables('totalWorkOrders')),
  ' (',
  string(div(mul(variables('runningDoneUnits'), 100), variables('totalWorkOrders'))),
  '%)'
)

parameters.item/ts_errormessage: @concat(variables('errorMessage'), coalesce(variables('currentWorkOrderNumber'), 'Unknown'), ' (', coalesce(variables('currentWorkOrderId'), 'Unknown ID'), '). Flow run: ', coalesce(workflow()?['run']?['name'], 'N/A'), '. Please retry the export.')

inputs.name: progressMessageError
inputs.value: ❌ [Stage 2/3] Flow failed. Check error. Main PDFs:

inputs.name: errorMessage
inputs.value: Main PDF generation failed for work order

inputs.name: errorMessage
inputs.value: La génération du PDF principal a échoué pour l'ordre de travail

inputs.name: progressMessageError
inputs.value: ❌ [Stage 2/3] Échec du flux. Voir l'erreur. PDFs principaux :
